summary: Base W12 — the §10 test week (~14 mpw + race). Fri's 5K TT locks the goal tier (≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory) and formally recalibrates T pace after five straight T sessions quick of the 7:50–7:55 nudge. Mon's easy opener ran off-protocol hot — a progression to 8:09 @ HR 183 that felt chill — so the standing order for the rest of the week is honest Z1 only, nothing unprescribed before the TT (Adj #142). Big positive: no pain anywhere AM/during/post on the first run after Sat's biggest calf dose of the cycle — the Adj #135 Achilles recheck is satisfied and the after-only soreness pattern did not recur (Adj #143). W11 formally closed at 6.0 mi: Wed confirmed skipped at logging, Fri and the Sat long also skipped (Adj #144). Lifts carry the biggest bump slate of the cycle: Tue Hyp A = rear-delt 135 (Adj #130), decline crunch add-load (Adj #131), pushdown 25 re-attempt pain-gated (Adj #136), plus the §5 incline AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W12 (Adj #126); Sat Hyp B = lat pulldown 165 (Adj #133), DB lateral 35 (Adj #137), Sat decline crunch add-load (Adj #138). Seated calf holds 345 (zero headroom, Adj #135); preacher Sat holds 60 (Adj #139). Elbow §10.A clock running from 7-4.

days.note: Logged — ran as off-protocol progression: ~3.4 mi / 30:00 @ 8:46 avg (9:16/8:58/8:09/8:23), HR 167 avg / 185 peak, felt chill. No pain anywhere — Adj #135 Achilles recheck satisfied (Adj #142/#143). W11 Wed confirmed skipped (Adj #144).

Bumps: rear-delt fly 130→135 (Adj #130); decline crunch add ~10 lb DB / 25 lb plate at 3×12 (Adj #131); pushdown 22.5→25 re-attempt eligible, pain-gated (Adj #136). Incline §5 AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W12 (Adj #126). Preacher Tue slot 65 (Adj #128). Keep it clean of Fri — TT week.
§4.C W12 pre-TT sharpener — flat strides, cadence cap ≤180 (Adj #25/#62). Easy portion HONEST 9:45–10:45/mi — Mon already spent the week's unprescribed intensity budget (Adj #142).
Permanent off (Adj #92) — mobility / walk + daily SI prehab. Rest before the TT.

Goal tier locks here: ≤21:30 = sub-20 trajectory; 21:31–22:30 = downgrade to 20:59; >22:30 = downgrade to 21:30. Flat course or treadmill 1%, racing intent. Also formally recalibrates T pace (Adj #77/#93/#125). Full warmup; do not renegotiate the tier later. Mon's 8:09-at-chill mile is a good omen for ≤21:30.

days.session: Z1 easy 30 min (day-after) + Hyp B PM
days.note: Bumps: lat pulldown 160→165 on a clean set 3 (Adj #133); DB lateral 30→35 (Adj #137); decline crunch add small load at 3×10 (Adj #138). Holds: seated calf 345 zero-headroom (Adj #135); preacher Sat 60 — 65 needs a full clean outing (Adj #139); pushdown 25 if not attempted Tue, pain-gated (Adj #136); chest fly 130 (Adj #140). Run is a 30-min shakeout, truly easy.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1 pyramid, daily SI prehab.
